title: The emission-showcase block tracks the setpoint and drives its sensed signals
description: Under the deterministic clock the RFC 0004 emission policy is off, so every tick surfaces. Sets the writable Setpoint input, steps the 1 s timer, and checks the read-only readings track it and the monotonic counters climb. The throttle/deadband gate itself is shown in free-run DevHost + the unit tests, not here.

judge.text: Under the deterministic clock every tick surfaces (policy off); the readings track the setpoint and the counters climb each step.
